unternehmensname.label: Unternehmensname
unternehmensname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

rechtsform.label: Rechtsform
rechtsform.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

bilanz_unternehmen.label: Unternehmen
bilanz_unternehmen.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Unternehmensstammdaten' with the id `69e729e1f143a27105f81df5` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69e729e1f143a27105f81df5/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

geschaeftsjahr.label: Geschäftsjahr
geschaeftsjahr.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

bilanzstichtag.label: Bilanzstichtag
bilanzstichtag.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.
